items.name: Scorched Wasteland Vest
items.description: Lo, the raiments of the forsaken. This sundered garb, once a bulwark ‘gainst the blight, now beareth the mark of judgment. The visor, shattered as the heavens in wrath; the mask, stained with the crimson toll of fate. He who donneth this shroud walketh not unscathed, but as one whom fire hath claimed and mercy hath forsaken.
